title: MC AI Chatbot
description: Plugin to talk with Gemini in-game.
body:
This plugin lets you talk to the Gemini API from in-game.

How to use:
1. Download the .jar
2. Put .jar in your server's plugins folder
3. Launch the server
4. Edit the config.yml in the plugin's folder to include a (free) Gemini api key
5. Restart server again
6. You can now chat to the bot by typing "@ai {message}"

This plugin has been tested on a 1.21.6 folia server.

made by https://vovaauer.com/
